PE.sub: Import pressure from US cargoes continues; domestic downside pressure persists despite cautious adjustments
bullets: Asia PE import activity declined sharply; Vietnam showing lowest regional offer prices
US PE offers at USD 850-880/tonne/CIF for LLDPE; HDPE at USD 930-970/tonne/CIF
Sabic settlement prices (Saudi) fell very sharply but buyers remain cautious on small orders
Domestic PE: LLDPE Film VND 32,000-33,000/kg; HDPE Film/blow VND 34,000-35,000/kg

PP.sub: South Korean competitive pressure intensifies; Sabic July settlement at USD 1,020/tonne; domestic prices down VND 500-1,000/kg
bullets: Asian PP homo fell sharply USD 90-130/tonne; buyers cautious on expectations of further declines
S-Oil Korea PP yarn/injection settlement: USD 1,020/tonne/CIF (down USD 20 vs prior week)
Domestic: NSRP PP 114G VND 31,000/kg (down VND 500); BSR T3034 down VND 1,000 to VND 31,400/kg
Hanwha Korea PP HJ500 remains cheapest at VND 30,000/kg for early July arrival

PVC.sub: Abundant regional supply pressures prices; domestic coal-based SG-5 steady at VND 20,500/kg; oil-based AGC Vina at VND 20,900/kg
bullets: Asian PVC prices fell to USD 690-720/tonne/CFR; imported prices into Vietnam USD 670-700/tonne/CIF
China consumption recovery slow post-Dragon Boat holiday; price cuts to stimulate demand
Domestic: Coal-based PVC SG-5 VND 20,500/kg; oil-based AGC Vina VND 20,900/kg (prices holding)
Higher-priced segment: Shintech USA SE950/SE1000 at VND 21,500/kg shows significant competitive pressure
